title: SOAP Error Handling
text: SOAP Error Handling Uniface uses the SOAP protocol for web services call-in and call-out. If an error occurs during execution of a web service, the web service sends a SOAP fault as a response. When an error occurs during web service call-in, Uniface generates a SOAP fault for some errors and and returns it to the caller of the web service. You can also generate your own SOAP faults in the SOAP callback operations. When an error occurs during web service call-out, Uniface generates error -150 and provides details about the error in $procerrorcontext . One type of error could be a SOAP Fault received from the remote web service provider. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
